_comment: Cosmos DB indexing policy for the 'photos' container (replaces firestore.indexes.json). Cosmos indexes ALL paths by default, so single-field sorts work with no config. Composite indexes are only needed for multi-field ORDER BY. Apply with: az cosmosdb sql container update -a <acct> -g <rg> -d eventphotos -n photos --idx @infra/cosmos-indexes.json
